person.name: Bowei Xia
person.status: MSc student in Computer Science at UESTC
person.bio: I work on language agents, multi-agent systems, and agent evaluation.
person.headline: Research engineer working on language agents, multi-agent systems, and evaluation
person.summary: Computer science graduate researcher building agent systems, evaluation benchmarks, and practical open-source infrastructure.

education.institution: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China

education.degree: BSc in Information Management and Information Systems

publications.title: OWL: Optimized Workforce Learning for General Multi-Agent Assistance in Real-World Task Automation
publications.summary: A hierarchical multi-agent framework that separates planning, coordination, and specialized execution, with reinforcement learning for cross-domain planner generalization.
highlights: 69.70% on GAIA, reported as open-source state of the art

publications.title: Enhancing Transformer-based Models for Long Sequence Time Series Forecasting via Structured Matrix
publications.summary: Structured surrogate attention and feed-forward blocks for improving efficiency while retaining expressive power in long-sequence forecasting.
highlights: 12.4% average performance improvement across reported experiments

projects.name: Tool-Genesis
projects.summary: A benchmark for evaluating whether language models can recover latent contracts and create functional MCP tools from incomplete requirements.
highlights: Four-level diagnostic evaluation from surface compliance to task utility

projects.name: notion-mcp-bridge
projects.summary: A persistent stdio bridge that keeps Notion MCP OAuth credentials in macOS Keychain for local coding agents.

projects.name: Conpera Town
projects.summary: Implemented economy, building interiors, scene persistence, furniture APIs, map tooling, and Tiled integration for an AI town starter kit.

contributions.summary: Added asynchronous execution support to BrowserToolkit.

awards.title: Gold Award
awards.awarder: Provincial E-Commerce Innovation, Creativity and Entrepreneurship Challenge

awards.title: Second Prize
awards.awarder: China Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling

privacy.policy: Only first-party public information with explicit evidence is included.
